Higher Education Council Formatted CV

Rate Us

Short CV

Assistant Faculty Member Recep YILMAZ was born in 1993 in Adana. He graduated from Üsküdar University, Department of Electroneurophysiology in 2012. YILMAZ worked as an Electroneurophysiology Technician at Acıbadem Hospital between 2014-2018 and American Hospital between 2018-2020.
